case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION AS TO $639.00 U.S. CURRENCY ONLY. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $639.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT BRENDAN BORENI. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION REGARDING STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AS TO $10,300.00 U.S. CURRENCY; $643.00 U.S. CURRENCY ONLY FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $10,300.00 U.S. CURRENCY; $643.00 U.S. CURRENCY ONLY IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11470 ET SEQ. AS AGAINST ANY AND ALL INTERESTED PARTIES AND BE DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION FOR FORFEITURE IN REM (17-045 AND 17-052) (TRANSACTION ID # 60808518) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT AS TO $639.00 U.S. CURRENCY ONLY FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA BORENI, BRENDAN
